§6Aluminium§f

§aA light, soft metal essential for fireclay, rocketry, and advanced alloys.§f

Aluminium ore is found between Y 5–45. Process it via smelting, the electrolysis machine, arc furnace/crucible, or rotary furnace. Its powdered form is used in thermite.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Fireclay§f (clay + aluminium → firebricks)
§b• Fluid ducts
§b• Gunmetal§f (rotary furnace: aluminium + red copper)
§b• Arc welding§f (aluminium plates)
§b• Low-density elements & liquid storage

§eTip§f: Bauxite is a common source — process it for higher yields.
